basic_details.job_title: HLL Junior Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: HLL Lifecare (HLL) Junior Manager (Technical) Notification 2026 has been released on 7 July 2026 on the official website of HLL Lifecare (https://www.lifecarehll.com). A total of 1 Junior Manager (Technical) vacancy has been announced through the HLL Junior Manager (Technical) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 37 years as on 01-07-2026. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates will be as per Government of India directives.

qualification.education_qualification: BE/B.Tech (Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE) / Electronics Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering) from a recognized University / Institution
qualification.details: BE/B.Tech (Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE) / Electronics Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering) from a recognized University / Institution.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HLL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download HLL Junior Manager (Technical) Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.hll_lifecare_hll: BE/B.Tech (Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE) / Electronics Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering) from a recognized University / Institution

content_sections.heading: HLL Junior Manager (Technical) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the HLL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download HLL Junior Manager (Technical) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: HLL Junior Manager (Technical) Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: BE/B.Tech (Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE) / Electronics Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering) from a recognized University / Institution.

content_sections.heading: HLL Junior Manager (Technical) Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 37 years as on 01-07-2026. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates will be as per Government of India directives.

content_sections.heading: HLL Junior Manager (Technical) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HLL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: HLL Junior Manager (Technical) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HLL Junior Manager (Technical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the HLL Junior Manager (Technical) recruitment is 22nd July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Manager (Technical) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BE/B.Tech degree in Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE), Electronics Engineering, or Electrical & Electronics Engineering from a recognized University or Institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Manager (Technical) post is 37 years as of 1st July 2026. Age relaxation will be provided to SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Manager (Technical) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 20,000 to Rs. 40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Manager (Technical) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Manager (Technical) post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website or the provided application link to submit their forms.

faq.question: Q8. What are the important dates for the application process?
faq.answer: The application process starts on 7th July 2026 and ends on 22nd July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted within this period.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Junior Manager (Technical) role?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an Interview and Document Verification. Candidates shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview will be considered.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to check the official website for any further updates.
